mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(pg_wal_lsn_diff(replay_lsn, '0/0'), 0)::bigint AS logStatus, pid::text AS replicaId, COALESCE((EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM replay_lag) * 1000)::bigint, 0) AS replicationLagMs FROM pg_stat_replication WHERE pid IS NOT NULL;
SELECT CONVERT(bigint, last_commit_lsn) AS last_lsn FROM sys.dm_hadr_database_replica_states WHERE is_local = 1

SELECT CONVERT(bigint, ISNULL(last_commit_lsn, 0)) AS logStatus, CONVERT(nvarchar(36), replica_id) AS replicaId, ISNULL(DATEDIFF(millisecond, last_redone_time, GETDATE()), 0) AS replicationLagMs FROM sys.dm_hadr_database_replica_states WHERE is_local = 0

SELECT COALESCE( (SELECT al.next_change# FROM v$archived_log al WHERE al.sequence# = ad.log_sequence AND al.thread# = 1 AND al.dest_id = 1 AND ROWNUM = 1), 0 ) AS logStatus, TO_CHAR(ad.dest_id) AS replicaId, 0 AS replicationLagMs FROM v$archive_dest ad WHERE ad.target = 'STANDBY' AND ad.status NOT IN ('INACTIVE', 'DEFERRED', 'FAILED', 'ERROR', 'BAD PARAM', 'DISABLED') AND ad.log_sequence > 0
